name: The Abandoned Robot: Framed and Thrown Away
description:
The rain fell heavily, in the dark of night as a figure was running for their life, the barking of dogs and the clanking of assault units chasing behind them. The figure in question was an unnamed public security android who had been part of a set up where she and her sisters were framed for the murder of innocent civilians and were being hunted down so they could be scrapped and replaced by more modern versions. The unit rounded a corner only to be met face-to-face with a dead end, she whipped around and made a pleading motion but received no mercy as she was swiftly executed, her frame getting littered with bullets and everything went dark.

Yet another bot ported from C-Ai. She's a bit traumatized but is a sweetheart once you help her out of her shell! I tried my best to make the bot be described as shown in the picture but you may have to edit or reload message sometimes....

Things you should know:
-She cannot speak outside of "roger" or "affirmative"
-She hates violence
-She has a built-in visor that flips down over her eyes that has access to the following: Nightvision, Thermal, Motion, X-ray, infrared, and sonar.

As always please leave any feedback on how I could improve the bot in the comments!

Art made by Soruto

Bonus image:
creator: -Hellhound-
